pages.title: Log Files
pages.text: $(bold)Location$(): `.minecraft/logs/latest.log`$(br2)$(bold)Look for$(): $(li)`[FPSCompress]` log lines $(li)Error stack traces $(li)Warning messages$(br2)$(bold)Include in bug reports$(): $(li)Full log file (or relevant excerpt) $(li)Steps to reproduce $(li)Mod version

pages.title: Bug Reports
pages.text: $(bold)Report at$(): GitHub Issues (check mod page for link)$(br2)$(bold)Include$(): $(li)FPSCompress version $(li)Minecraft version $(li)NeoForge version $(li)Compact Machines version $(li)Steps to reproduce $(li)Log file $(li)Screenshots (if applicable)

pages.title: Common Log Errors
pages.text: $(bold)Error: "Can't find Importer UUID abc-123"$() $(li)Importer was broken or moved $(li)Solution: Replace Importer, reconfigure PreFab face$(br2)$(bold)Error: "CM room not found for code XYZ"$() $(li)CM dimension issue $(li)Solution: Re-enter CM to initialize, replace PreFab$(br2)$(bold)Error: "Capability not found"$() $(li)Adjacent block doesn't support IItemHandler $(li)Solution: Use supported blocks (chests, hoppers, machines)$(br2)---
